headline: STOP FALSIFIED MEDICINES AT SOURCE
subheading: Decode FMD safety features, the unique identifier and the GB versus NI split your QMS must master.
flux_prompt: A clinical-luxury abstract editorial background evoking pharmaceutical authentication and supply-chain integrity, set in deep navy gradients washed with luminous teal and cyan light. A softly glowing abstract 2D data-matrix grid of squares dissolves into flowing particles of verified light, symbolising a unique identifier being scanned and decommissioned. An intact tamper-evident seal motif and a sealed carton silhouette float in shallow depth of field above a polished reflective surface, with delicate interlocking node-and-line networks tracing a secure distribution chain. A diverging path of glowing filaments splits gracefully into two routes, suggesting a regulatory divergence between two territories. Subtle emerald-green accents catch the edges of the geometry, conveying trust, precision and protection. Cool reflections, refined volumetric lighting, clean negative space, premium minimal high-tech aesthetic. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
